issues.sample: CAR SHUT DOWN WHILE IN TOLL BOOTH. WOULD NOT RECOGNIZE KEY EVERYTHING WENT BLACK ON DASH. COULD NOT GET OUT OF CAR DUE TO TOLL BARRIERS. THEN ABOUT 30 SEC LATER MESSAGE CAME ON DASH THAT NEEDED TO MOVE KEY FOB CLOSER - I DO NOT REMEMBER EXACT WORDING. I TOOK KEY OUT OF MY RIGHT F

narrative.headline: What 2015 Jaguar F-Type owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 6 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (50% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
